verse.name: v1
verse.lines: My rock, my shield My Jesus is real I can feel Him deep within my soul One day He saved my soul And He made me free and whole My Lord, He's real I can feel Him in my soul

verse.name: v2
verse.lines: One night, I repented I got down on my bended knees Cried, "Lord, have mercy Won't You save my soul from sin" I'm walking not alone 'Cause I'm headed straight for home My Lord, He's real I can feel Him in my soul

verse.name: v3
verse.lines: Come to Jesus, repent, Get your feet on a solid Rock He's the one who can help you He will hear you when you cry It's Jesus, my Savior He's a friend and a faithful God My Lord, He's real, He will lead you to the other side

verse.name: v4
verse.lines: My Lord, He's real I can feel Him in my soul
